name: loom-product-principles
description: Key-free generator for a product PRINCIPLES.md — one north-star + falsifiable, testable principles.

interface.shortDescription: Turn a sparse product idea into a falsifiable PRINCIPLES.md constitution
interface.longDescription: The product-principles skill turns a sparse product idea into a PRINCIPLES.md product constitution — one north-star plus 3-7 non-negotiable, falsifiable, testable principles. Use it before design/spec/build so the resulting constitution governs downstream design, spec, and code decisions.
defaultPrompt: Write the product principles for this idea.
Define a north-star and constitution for this product.
Turn this rough concept into a PRINCIPLES.md.
